posts.name: Mark Golodetz
posts.cooked: To my knowledge, I have never friended Christ, so somewhat confused by this.
You’re confused? How about the rest of us?!

posts.name: Anton Dotson
posts.cooked:
To my knowledge, I have never friended Christ, so somewhat confused by this.

Maybe he meant Charlie, the congressman, and misspelled it.

I have several friends named Jesus.

As weird as it may seem, my son’s girlfriend is the daughter of Jesus. (I never, you know, thought he indulged in that earthly pleasure stuff.)

You’re confused? How about the rest of us?!

LOL! Truly, laughing out loud here

posts.name: Karl K@zaks
posts.cooked: Mark, maybe a message that Christ is a friend of yours - even if you don’t know it.

posts.name: Markus S
posts.cooked: Maybe you could fill us in on your private joke?
